ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each wine sample */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the production batch the wine belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of wine (e.g., red, white) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of wine production */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Size of the production batch */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the wine */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year the grapes were harvested */,
  "grape_variety" TEXT /* Type of grapes used (e.g., Cabernet Sauvignon, Chardonnay) */,
  "fermentation_type" TEXT /* Type of fermentation process used (e.g., spontaneous, inoculated) */,
  "barrel_type" TEXT /* Type of barrel used for aging (e.g., oak, stainless steel) */,
  "aging_time" INTEGER /* Duration of aging in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of chemical properties */,
  "wine_id" TEXT /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity level */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity level */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid level */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar level */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides level */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Free sulfur dioxide level */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Total sulfur dioxide level */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphates level */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content */,
  "malic_acid" REAL /* Malic acid level */,
  "tartaric_acid" REAL /* Tartaric acid level */,
  "iron" REAL /* Iron level */,
  "magnesium" REAL /* Magnesium level */,
  "sulphur_dioxide_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of free to total sulfur dioxide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_properties_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating */,
  "wine_id" TEXT /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score given to the wine (1-10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taster who rated the wine */,
  "appearance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the appearance of the wine (1-10) */,
  "aroma_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the aroma of the wine (1-10) */,
  "taste_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the taste of the wine (1-10) */,
  "finish_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the finish of the wine (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES tasters ("taster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the production batch */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date the batch production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date the batch production ended */,
  "production_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production manager responsible for the batch */,
  "winery_id" TEXT /* ID of the winery where the batch was produced */,
  "production_location" TEXT /* Location within the winery where the batch was produced */,
  "total_bottles_produced" INTEGER /* Total number of bottles produced in the batch */,
  "bottling_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was bottled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_production_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_manager_id") REFERENCES production_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the production manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the production manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the production manager */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the manager has */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., red wine, white wine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasters" (
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taster */,
  "taster_name" TEXT /* Full name of the taster */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the taster */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., red wine, white wine) */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications the taster holds */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the taster has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, quality control, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., production, quality control) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
